What You'll Learn
Master the art of storytelling in presentation decks: Transform your slides into
engaging storytelling tools that engage your audiences and listeners at all times.
Learn the important role that human cognition plays in building a deck and
presentation and how it’s almost always ignored in business today.
Discover what the most important slide in any deck is.
Learn how stakes, suspense, surprise, and humor can be deployed in any deck to
transform a forgettable presentation into a memorable performance.
